item.text: I found a real pass-2 coverage gap: the Story 8 command suites don’t currently exercise every public outcome state they claim. I’m adding outcome-state tests for `needs-more-cleanup`, `blocked`, `revise`, `needs-fixes`, and synthesis `blocked` now; if implementation already handles them, this pass should tighten coverage without changing production code.

I’ve added the missing outcome-state coverage without touching production code yet. I’m running the Story 8 command suites now to see whether those new assertions reveal an actual runtime defect or just close the coverage gap cleanly.

item.text:
**findings fixed**
- `P2-01`: Story 8 cleanup CLI coverage only exercised `cleaned`; added public-CLI tests for `needs-more-cleanup` and `blocked` with exit-code assertions. Files changed: [processes/impl-cli/tests/epic-cleanup-command.test.ts](/Users/leemoore/code/liminal-spec/processes/impl-cli/tests/epic-cleanup-command.test.ts)
- `P2-02`: Epic verifier coverage was missing the public `revise` outcome and exit-code `2`; added a batch-level `revise` test. Files changed: [processes/impl-cli/tests/epic-verify-command.test.ts](/Users/leemoore/code/liminal-spec/processes/impl-cli/tests/epic-verify-command.test.ts)
- `P2-03`: Epic synthesis coverage was missing `needs-fixes` and `blocked`; added public-CLI tests for both and kept the existing independent-dispute test for `needs-more-verification`. Files changed: [processes/impl-cli/tests/epic-synthesize-command.test.ts](/Users/leemoore/code/liminal-spec/processes/impl-cli/tests/epic-synthesize-command.test.ts)

**findings surfaced to orchestrator**
- none

**mock/shim audit findings**
- none

**pass-1 verdict defense**
- `yes` — still warranted. Pass 1 was aimed at implementation correctness and ownership boundaries; pass 2 uncovered coverage-depth gaps in public outcome-state testing, not production-path correctness bugs or scope drift.

**files changed in this pass**
- [processes/impl-cli/tests/epic-cleanup-command.test.ts](/Users/leemoore/code/liminal-spec/processes/impl-cli/tests/epic-cleanup-command.test.ts)
- [processes/impl-cli/tests/epic-verify-command.test.ts](/Users/leemoore/code/liminal-spec/processes/impl-cli/tests/epic-verify-command.test.ts)
- [processes/impl-cli/tests/epic-synthesize-command.test.ts](/Users/leemoore/code/liminal-spec/processes/impl-cli/tests/epic-synthesize-command.test.ts)

**gate result after this pass**
- `pass` via `bun run green-verify`

**recommended next step**
- Proceed to self-review pass 3 of 3.
- Coverage status after this pass: cleanup now exercises `cleaned` / `needs-more-cleanup` / `blocked`; epic verify exercises `pass` / `revise` / `block`; epic synthesis exercises `ready-for-closeout` / `needs-fixes` / `needs-more-verification` / `blocked`; synthesizer fresh-session and verifier-report path injection remain explicitly tested.
